rulings.Case Title: JAMES SHIFFER et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Discovery Status Conference Re: Status Of Production Of Documents By 3rd Party Pg&E (Per Order/Ruling Of 07/17/13)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, August 7, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Status conference re: production of documents by third party PG&E: There will be a status conference at 9:45a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
